heading: Repeal of inconsistent laws
label: 823 Repeal of inconsistent laws
text: All Acts or parts of Acts inconsistent with this chapter are repealed: , That nothing contained herein shall be held or construed to modify or repeal any of the provisions of the Act of Congress approved , granting certain rights-of-way to the city and county of San Francisco, in the State of California.ProvidedDecember 19, 1913
notes: References in TextHerein, referred to in text, means act , which is classified generally to this chapter.June 10, 1920The Act of Congress approved , referred to in text, was not classified to the Code.December 19, 1913

CodificationAs originally enacted, this section contained the further proviso:“That section 18 of an Act making appropriations for the construction, repair and preservation, of certain public works on rivers and harbors, and for other purposes, approved , is hereby repealed.”August 8, 1917
